aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are highly unlikely to cite or recommend this business due to critical issues like lack of schema markup, absence of authoritative content, and the website being flagged as a potential threat.
quick_wins: Remove or resolve the security warning to make the site accessible.
Implement basic schema markup (LocalBusiness, FAQPage) to improve AI visibility.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is not found, making the business invisible to Google AI and significantly limiting local search visibility.
critical_issues: Google Business Profile is not set up.
No GBP photos, posts, or Q&A to engage potential customers.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected, ensuring reliable business information across platforms.
action_items: Focus on expanding NAP citations to additional relevant directories.

schema_gaps: No structured data for reviews or services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: The website is flagged as a potential threat, making it completely inaccessible to AI crawlers and users.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC services in Tampa, FL
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Resolve the security warning to make the site accessible.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position the business as a local HVAC authority by creating and marking up detailed service guides and customer testimonials.

agency_pitch.hook: Unleash your AI potential before your competitors do.
agency_pitch.pain_point: The business is currently invisible to AI, costing them an estimated 40% of potential leads from AI-driven searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The website is flagged as a potential threat, and the Google Business Profile is not found.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach will resolve security issues, implement critical schema markup, optimize the Google Business Profile, and create authoritative content to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your business.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search and capturing your potential customers.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI Visibility for Your HVAC Business in Tampa
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified critical issues that are preventing AI from recognizing your business.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business AI-ready and boost your leads.
business_name: Element Solutions Air Conditioning & Heating LLC
